title: DRW MD-DRW-533: Enhanced ESC Heatsink
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-533 Rev C — Enhanced ESC Heatsink

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1041, P-1042, P-1051.
4. Drawn by Marcus Thaine, checked by Rowan Ellery, approved by Felix Herrera.
